title: Business plans
summary: 9609 AS — purpose, contents, and limitations of business plans for start-ups and growth.
learningObjectives: Explain the purpose of a business plan.
Identify key sections of a plan.
Analyse benefits for investors and owners.

simpleExplanation.title: Planning before launching
simpleExplanation.summary: A business plan sets objectives, market analysis, finance forecasts, and operations — used to secure funding and guide decisions.

sections.content: **Business plans** (1.1.3) appear in **Paper 2 case studies**. Reference **specific sections** — not vague "helps planning".
